name: Ladprao General Hospital Public Company Limited
summary: Ladprao General Hospital Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the hospital business in Thailand. It operates in two segments, Hospital, and Scientific Laboratory Testing & Research. The company operates Ladprao General Hospital, a private hospital with a capacity of approximately 200 in-patient beds and with approximately 500 physicians in various fields. Its hospital provides services in the areas of internal medicine, pediatrics, women's health, ophthalmology, otolaryngology, general surgery, orthopedic surgery, cardiology and neurology, skin and beauty, dentistry and hemodialysis, etc. The company also offers scientific analytical and diagnostic, and research services for medical, agricultural, food and drug industries; inspection and certification of quality systems; agricultural plant protection product efficiency assessment services; testing and analysis services for pesticide residues and hazardous substances; and hospital management and consulting services, as well as provides health mobile checkup and nurse services in factories and agencies. Ladprao General Hospital Public Company Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
